description_long: This nightstand features a modern, geometric design with a square top and four sturdy legs. The top surface and lower shelf are adorned with intricate, gold-colored calligraphic or graffiti-style patterns set against a matte black background, giving it a striking urban aesthetic. The nightstand has a two-tier structure, with a spacious open shelf beneath the top surface for additional storage or display. The legs are straight and robust, providing stability and a contemporary look. There are no visible handles or drawers, emphasizing a minimalist, open-access design. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, possibly steel, with decorative metallic inlays or printed patterns.
description: A modern black nightstand with gold calligraphic patterns, featuring a two-tier open shelf design and sturdy straight legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold-patterned top and open lower shelf, with the decorative motif clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the depth of the open shelf and the continuity of the gold pattern on both tiers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the shelf's interior and the geometric alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the symmetry of the design and the uninterrupted gold pattern on the lower shelf.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside seating in urban interiors
